title: LIC HFL Junior Assistant Admit Card 2026 for 180 Post
short_information: LIC Housing Finance Ltd (LIC HFL) has Released LIC HFL Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification. Those candidates who are Enrolled in this LIC HFL Junior Assistant Vacancy 2026 can Download Admit Card. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, pay scale and all other information. LIC Housing Finance Ltd (LIC HFL) LIC HFL Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026 LIC HFL 2026 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / OBC / EWS : Rs. 800/- SC / ST / PH : Rs. 800/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking LIC HFL Junior Assistant
eligibility: Read the Notification. LIC HFL Junior Assistant Exam 2026: State Wise

tables.table_name: LIC HFL Junior Assistant Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/04/2026 Minimum Age : 21 Years Maximum Age : 30 Years Age Relaxation Extra as per LIC HFL Junior Assistant Recruitment Rules.
rows: Bachelor Degree in Any Stream with Minimum 60% Marks. Note : Course Complete Through Correspondence / Distance / Part Time Are Not Eligible More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.
